commit.message:
feat(layout-generation): implement algorithmic floorplan layout generation system

Adds a new feature module that generates multiple interior partition layouts
from a user-drawn boundary using squarified treemap subdivision with
architectural constraints. Phase 1 of the Finch 3D-inspired system.

Key components:
- Boundary extraction via half-edge face enumeration on planar graph
- Two-pass squarified treemap (zones → rooms) with area normalization
- WallGraph conversion with T-junction handling and node deduplication
- Door placement on shared walls using adjacency matrix weights
- Constraint validation (min areas, connectivity, window access)
- Corridor insertion for disconnected room graphs
- Scoring system (adjacency satisfaction, space efficiency, proportionality)
- Room program editor UI with dwelling type presets (1BR/2BR/3BR)
- Side-by-side variant card display with SVG mini-previews
- Zustand store for generation state
- Toolbar integration with layout generator panel toggle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add layout generation system technical specification

Comprehensive spec covering the algorithmic floorplan generation
system: treemap-based layout generation, architectural constraints,
wall graph analysis, and future GA optimization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore(floorplan-2d): remove temporary wall graph debug logger

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix spec review AI settings not syncing across devices

- aiService.ts: getAISettings() now checks cloud-synced cache as fallback
  when primary localStorage key is empty (fixes "not configured" on other
  devices). saveAISettings() accepts userId param from auth context.
- SpecReviewModule.tsx: Use isAdmin from auth context instead of hardcoded
  ADMIN_EMAILS array. Pass user.id to saveAISettings for proper cloud sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add postquantum gravity Onsager-Machlup action example

Full SVT decomposition of the fourth-derivative gravity action
I = (1/4) L_{μν} L^{μν} - β(∂_μ∂_ν h^{μν} - □h)² into tensor,
vector, and scalar sectors. Computes all two-point functions for
Bardeen potentials (Φ, ψ, V_i, h^TT_{ij}) using TensorGR's
QuadraticForm, perturbation engine, and projector infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

- DaemonLogsPage now uses useDaemonControl.refreshLogs() over HTTP instead
  of Tauri-only native invoke — works in web mode during dev (npm run dev)
- SettingsModal passes connection prop to LazyDaemonLogsPage
- Fix 4 invalid runOperation IDs caught by parity test:

  vault.push → vault.push-rules

- Fix GCP WIF pool ID: seiko-github-pool → seiko-gh-pool-v2 (soft-deleted conflict)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add shader effects variety, scan sweep, boot-up reveal, and robustness fixes

Shader enhancements:
- Per-tile variation: scanline density, grain intensity, and flicker rate
  derived from seed — tiles no longer animate in lockstep.
- CRT scan sweep: slow bright horizontal line moves down each tile at
  unique per-tile speed. Classic CRT monitor effect.
- Power dip phase offset: per-tile so panels don't all dim at once.
- Boot-up reveal: tiles scan-on top-to-bottom with a bright leading edge
  instead of flat opacity fade. Driven by uReveal uniform.

Robustness:
- Video disposal now calls removeAttribute('src') + load() for proper
  browser resource release.
- Resize debounced (250ms) to prevent tile respawn spam during window drag.
- Resize timer cleaned up on exit and dispose.

UX:
- Drag & drop visual feedback: translucent green "DROP FILES" overlay
  appears when dragging files over the window.
- Drop zone uses dragenter/dragleave counter for proper nested handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(invite): auto-login after account creation — redirect directly to portal

After a client accepts an invite and creates their account, they are now
automatically signed in and redirected to /portal without ever seeing the
login page.

Changes:
- /api/invites/accept: after user creation, generate an admin magic-link
  token (generateLink type:"magiclink") and return its hashed_token in
  the response.
- invite/client/[token]/page.tsx: use verifyOtp(token_hash, "magiclink")
  as the primary auto-login method (more reliable — server-issued, no
  propagation race), with signInWithPassword as fallback. Only falls
  back to /login if both methods fail.
- Reduced success redirect delay from 2 s → 1.5 s for snappier UX.

commit.message:
feat: 添加拍照后区域选择功能

📷 图片裁剪功能：
- 创建 CropImageActivity - 图片裁剪页面
- 创建 CropOverlayView - 可交互的裁剪选择框
- 支持拖动四个角和四条边调整选择区域
- 支持拖动中心区域整体移动选择框
- 九宫格辅助线帮助构图

🎨 UI/UX 设计：
- 半透明遮罩显示裁剪外区域
- 白色边框 + 角点标记
- 顶部工具栏：取消 / 确认
- 底部提示："拖动边框调整翻译区域"

🔧 技术实现：
- 自定义 View 处理触摸事件
- Handle 枚举识别拖动位置
- RectF 计算裁剪比例
- Bitmap.createBitmap() 裁剪图片
- Activity Result API 传递结果

📱 使用流程：
1. 拍照/选图 → 保存到临时文件
2. 跳转到裁剪页面
3. 用户调整选择区域
4. 确认 → 裁剪图片
5. 返回裁剪后的图片
6. OCR + 翻译

优势：
- 只翻译用户关心的区域
- 避免无关文字干扰
- 提高OCR准确率
- 节省翻译时间

对应用户需求：拍照图片可以选取区域

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
v0.1.9: Fix updater reporting version 0.1.0

Add explicit version field to tauri.conf.json pointing to package.json.
Without this, the Tauri updater fell back to a default 0.1.0 instead of
reading the actual version from Cargo.toml, causing an infinite update
loop for all users on all platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(ext/node): consolidate fs modules (batch 2) (#32505)

## Summary

Continues the consolidation started in #32502 by inlining 5 more small
`_fs` modules into `fs.ts`:

- **`_fs_fsync.ts`** → `fsync`, `fsyncSync` inlined into `fs.ts`
- **`_fs_fdatasync.ts`** → `fdatasync`, `fdatasyncSync` inlined into
`fs.ts`
- **`_fs_link.ts`** → `link`, `linkSync` inlined into `fs.ts`
- **`_fs_unlink.ts`** → `unlink`, `unlinkSync` inlined into `fs.ts`
- **`_fs_fchmod.ts`** → `fchmod`, `fchmodSync` inlined into `fs.ts`

Additional changes:
- **`internal/fs/promises.ts`**: inlined `link`/`unlink` promise
versions
- **`internal/fs/handle.ts`**: imports `fchmod`/`fdatasync`/`fsync` from
`node:fs` and creates promisified versions locally
- **`cp/cp.ts`** and **`cp/cp_sync.ts`**: use
`Deno.remove`/`Deno.removeSync` directly instead of importing from the
now-deleted `_fs_unlink.ts`
- **Tests**: consolidated from 4 separate test files into `fs_test.ts`

This removes 5 small modules from the module graph, continuing to reduce
startup overhead.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: pinpoint mode for point-and-click annotations (#232)

* feat: add pinpoint mode for point-and-click annotations

Adds a new input method toggle (Drag / Pinpoint) orthogonal to the
existing annotation action modes (Selection / Comment / Redline).

In pinpoint mode, hovering over blocks and inline elements shows a
dashed outline with a label tooltip. Clicking auto-selects the
element's text via highlighter.fromRange(), firing the same CREATE
event as drag-selection — all downstream annotation flow is unchanged.

New files:
- blockTargeting.ts: resolves hover targets (inlines, cells, list items, blocks)
- usePinpoint.ts: hover/click state machine with text-range bridge
- PinpointOverlay.tsx: dashed outline + label badge
- InputMethodToggle.tsx: Drag/Pinpoint segmented toggle
- inputMethod.ts: cookie-based persistence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: unified AnnotationToolstrip with smooth animations

Merge InputMethodToggle + ModeSwitcher into a single compact toolbar
with two pill groups: input method (Select/Pinpoint) and action mode
(Markup/Comment/Redline). Buttons expand to show labels on hover/active
with explicit pixel-width transitions. Suppress transitions on mount
to prevent initial flash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: keyboard shortcuts tab and settings reorganization

Add Shortcuts tab to settings with OS-aware key cap styling and
organized shortcut groups. Move Obsidian and Bear integrations
to dedicated tabs under an Integrations sidebar group, leaving
compact navigation links on the Saving tab.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Alt/Option key to switch between Select and Pinpoint

Hold Alt to temporarily switch input method (reverts on release).
Double-tap Alt to permanently toggle. Added to keyboard shortcuts
panel in settings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove md:py-8 to use consistent py-3 padding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: toolbar polish — icon swap, full opacity active states, styling

Move text-bracket icon to Select, pencil to Markup. Active buttons
use full opacity backgrounds with contrasting foreground. Help link
lowercase with updated styling. Revert md:py-8 padding. Add gap
between buttons in pill groups.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: match toolbar button sizing to main branch

Use text-xs (12px) and px-2.5 padding to match main branch button
rendering. Active state uses bg-background with no color tint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: smarter pinpoint hover — edge-zone tables, row targeting, list groups

Table edge-zone detection: top/bottom edges target whole table, left/right
edges target the specific row, interior targets individual cells. List group
wrappers create hover zones in gaps between consecutive list items. Demo
plan now includes sample tables for testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: remove unused InputMethodToggle component

Superseded by AnnotationToolstrip which unified input method + mode switching.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: remove unimplemented S3 paste store stub

Never used — paste service runs on Cloudflare KV and local FS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: remove dead ModeSwitcher component

Replaced by AnnotationToolstrip which unified mode switching + input method toggle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Add DataAsset, DataTable, and AnimBlueprint extraction support

- DataAssetExtractor: serializes all user-defined UPROPERTY fields via
  UE reflection, skipping base class properties
- DataTableExtractor: extracts row struct schema and all rows via
  GetRowMap() with property values
- AnimBlueprint: fix DetermineGraphType to detect AnimGraphs via schema
  class name; ExtractAllGraphs now discovers anim graphs not in standard
  arrays via GetObjectsWithOuter

  with cascade support

- MCP: add extract_dataasset and extract_datatable tools with truncation
  handling; update search/cascade descriptions for new types

commit.message:
fix(admin): graceful session validation on serverless cross-instance (#225)

On Vercel serverless, each function instance has its own in-memory
session store. When Redis is unavailable, a session created in one
instance would not be found in another's memory, causing 401 errors
on API calls (e.g., execution-wheel GitHub integration).

Fix: when a session is not found in Redis or in-memory, accept the
token if HMAC signature and timestamp are valid (graceful degradation).
Explicit revocation still works via in-memory revokedSessions set and
allRevokedAt timestamp for revokeAll.

Add 8 tests covering cross-instance behavior, revocation, and expiry.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: restore submission.py to empty stub (was accidentally overwritten with solution)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: MCP HTTP transport — use short-lived sessions to avoid cross-task anyio issues

Stdio servers keep persistent sessions. HTTP servers reconnect per call
(stateless). Also fix BaseException catch for CancelledError in gather.

Fix IVFFlat index and add django.contrib.auth to INSTALLED_APPS

- Remove IVFFlat index: with small datasets (30 docs) the approximate
  nearest-neighbor index returns wrong results; exact cosine scan is correct
- Add django.contrib.auth to INSTALLED_APPS (required by DRF internally)

commit.message:
fix: Anthropic API 400 — messages에서 system role 분리, context 보존

build_messages()가 system+context를 role='system' 메시지로 반환하는데
_invoke_anthropic()이 이를 그대로 messages에 전달하여 Anthropic 400 에러 발생.
- messages 리스트에서 role='system' 항목 추출 → combined_system으로 사용
- 이로써 context(이전 스텝 결과)도 system 프롬프트에 올바르게 포함됨
